docs.title: How a2ex Works
docs.subtitle: a2ex is an OpenClaw plugin that gives your AI agent the ability to trade autonomously across prediction markets and DeFi venues.

step1.title: 1. Paste the URL
step1.description: Give your OpenClaw agent this URL. It reads the page, downloads the skill file, and installs the plugin automatically.

step2.title: 2. Bootstrap
step2.description: The AI creates a non-custodial wallet infrastructure on your machine — a Vault (cold, approval-based) and a Hot wallet ($50 instant limit).

step3.title: 3. Fund
step3.description: Send USDC + ETH on Arbitrum to the vault address the AI shows you. It polls the balance and proceeds automatically.

step4.title: 4. Trade
step4.description: The AI bridges funds, places orders on Polymarket and Hyperliquid, and manages positions — all autonomous.

safety.title: Safety
items: Non-custodial: 2-wallet model, keys never leave your machine
